name: termweave
description: A config-driven Tauri and OpenTUI builder for native desktop terminal apps.

scripts.build: bun run config:sync && bun run check && vite build
scripts.sdk:deps:audit: bun audit && bun audit --cwd sidecar && bun audit --cwd templates/project && cd src-tauri && cargo audit
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run deps:check && bun run format:check
scripts.tauri: bun run icons:generate && bun run config:sync && tauri
scripts.app:check: bun run check && bun run --cwd sidecar check
scripts.app:format: bun run format && bun run --cwd sidecar format
scripts.app:dev: bun run app:check && bun run icons:generate && bun run config:sync && bun run sidecar:dev-launcher && tauri dev
scripts.app:build: bun run app:check && bun run icons:generate && bun run config:sync && bun run sidecar:build && bun scripts/build-app.ts
